Health

With our young and dynamic structure, we adopt the mission of educating health professionals who attach importance to ethical and cultural values, respect human rights, apply their knowledge effectively, and are equipped in scientific and professional fields. Our Faculties of Dentistry and Health Sciences act with the vision of protecting human health, developing effective methods against health threats, contributing to legal regulations in the field of health and ensuring the achievement of high-level health standards at international level. Thanks to the trainings given in our Dental Hospital as well as well-equipped research and application laboratories, our students gain the necessary professional experience and are trained as competent health personnel.

Developing Effective Methods Against Situations Threatening Human Health:

Our university aims to develop effective methods and strategies to protect human health. In this context, research projects are continuously carried out and new treatment methods are developed. By taking an active role in these research projects, our students gain experience in producing innovative solutions to health problems.

Specialization in Disease Prevention and Treatment:

Our students specialize by gaining in-depth knowledge and skills in disease prevention and treatment. This specialization is supported by both theoretical courses and practical applications. Our students learn and apply the diagnosis and treatment processes of diseases through clinical internships and laboratory studies.

Opportunity to Transform Theoretical Knowledge into Practical Applications:

In the education process, we attach great importance to practical applications as well as theoretical knowledge. Our students have the opportunity to work in modern laboratories and clinical settings, thus gaining real-world experience. These experiences help our graduates acquire the practical skills they need to succeed in professional life.

Direct Contribution to Society with Ethical Values

We make a direct contribution to society with our work in the field of health and the professionals we train. Our university carries out various projects to increase the quality of health services and improve public health. In these projects, we adhere to ethical values, respect for human rights and principles of justice. By taking an active role in these projects, our students contribute to public health in accordance with ethical rules and gain awareness of social responsibility.

Applying Knowledge in the Light of Modern Science:

We offer our students the opportunity to effectively apply this knowledge by following the latest developments in modern science. Our education programs are constantly updated with scientific developments and technological innovations. In this way, our students master the latest knowledge and technologies in the field of health and can use this knowledge effectively in practice.
